programs.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "Conceiving Consciousness"
programs.desc: Simone Giertz, Reggie Watts, & Naomi Fitter, join Dianna for an exploration of what consciousness is & whether it can ever be understood. Also, a robot tells jokes.

programs.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "Randomness & Probability"
programs.desc: Comedian Maz Jobrani & Blackjack legend Mike Aponte play the odds, meanwhile, Dianna finds order in chaos, and just maybe hacks the stock market.

programs.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "Truth & Logical Paradox"
programs.desc: Dianna dives through the looking glass in this paradoxical exploration of truth itself, where the left could be right, & right might be wrong. w/ guest Zach Pincince.

programs.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "The Infinite"
programs.desc: Kyle Hill & Eugenia Cheng join the show to prove there is more than one infinity, that infinity is hidden all around us, & that we might actually be infinite ourselves.

programs.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "The Ocean’s Apex"
programs.desc: In this episode, we observe two of the ocean’s apex predators in the wild.

programs.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "Wind"
programs.desc: In this episode, Philippe takes us inside one of the most powerful forces on Earth - wind.
